verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I wonder how it must have felt When David stood to face Goliath on a hill I imagine that he shook with all his might Until You took his hand, and held on tight

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause You were there, You were there In the midst of danger's snare You were there, You were there always You were there when the hardest fight Seemed so out of reach Oh, You were there, You were always there You were always there

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So there he stood upon that hill Abraham with knife in hand was poised to kill But God in all his sovereignty had bigger plans And just in time, You brought a lamb

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Cause You were there, You were there In the midst of the unclear You were there, You were there always You were there when obedience Seemed to not make sense You were there, You were always there You were always there

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So haven't I learned that my ways Aren't as high as Yours are And You alone keep the universe From crumbling into dust You are God and though we would Not have understood You There You were

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hanging blameless on a cross You would rather die than leave us in the dark Every moment, Every planned coincidence Just all makes sense With Your last breath

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You were there, You were there During history's darkest hour You were there, You were there always You were the Victor and the King You were the power in David's swing You were the calm in Abraham You are the God who understands

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: You are the strength when we have none You are the living, Holy one You were, You are And You will always be the Risen Lamb of God

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: You were, You are And You will always be The Risen Lamb of God
